source: shared fake-transport delayed-response planning and shared CommonFakeDelayedResponse prototype
description: Pins deterministic delayed-response polling on a virtual clock so common runtime tests can distinguish pending transport responses from released payloads without wall-clock sleeps.

expected.commonDecision: Shared runtime tests must model delayed transport responses with a virtual clock, observable poll attempts, and a distinct pending label before delayed read, write, or notification orchestration delegates to shared.

notes: This vector covers only delayed-response polling as a base fake-transport control. Operation-specific timeout policy, notification collector behavior, cancellation cleanup, and public facade error mapping remain feature-specific shared ownership gates.
